summary.zh: 修复 Windows 受限命令因 PowerShell 初始化缺陷而卡死的问题，并加强真实 Windows 发布校验，避免安装包发布后才发现命令执行不可用。
summary.en: Fix restricted Windows commands hanging during PowerShell initialization and strengthen real Windows release verification, preventing unusable command execution from reaching published installers.

title.zh: Windows 受限命令不再卡死
title.en: Restricted Windows commands no longer hang

summary.zh: Windows 一次性命令现在默认使用稳定的 cmd.exe 受限执行路径；显式 PowerShell 在受限令牌下会立即提示改用 cmd 或经审查运行，不再等待超时。发布流程会在真实 Windows 环境中验证打包后的默认 cmd、Git、写入范围和拒绝写入规则。
summary.en: Windows one-shot commands now default to the stable restricted cmd.exe path; explicit PowerShell immediately asks for cmd-compatible syntax or reviewed execution instead of timing out under a restricted token. Releases verify packaged default cmd, Git, writable roots, and denied writes on real Windows.

sources.title: Windows restricted command startup and packaged release verification
